night: a photograph of a street at night
The road is dark under a moonlit sky.
Faint city lights glow along the night street.
The road is dark with only a few night lights.
The street is quiet under the night sky.
sunset: a photograph of a street at sunset
A warm orange hue covers the quiet street.
Fading sunset light stretches across the street.
The road glows orange in the sunset light.
Dusk settles slowly over the sunset road.
clear day: a photograph of a street on a clear day.
A soft breeze moves gently through the open atmosphere.
Blue stretches uninterrupted above the landscape.
The street is bright under the daytime sky.
Sunlight shines directly on the daytime road.
cloudy day: a photograph of a street on an overcast day.

The city feels quiet beneath a heavy overcast.
The street is dull under an cloudy sky.
The street is dull under an overcast sky.
rainy day: a photograph of a street on a rainy day.
Heavy rain pours down, flooding parts of the road.
Puddles form quickly as rain shows no sign of stopping.
Rain clouds hang low, turning the city gray and wet.
A steady downpour blankets the landscape in motionless gray.
snowy day: a photograph of a street on a snowy day.
Thick snow covers the road and nearby sidewalks.
Visibility drops as snow continues to fill the air.
Snow piles up quickly along the road edges.
Snow blankets the road in soft white.
foggy day: a photograph of a street on a foggy day.
Dense fog blankets the entire street, blurring everything.
Buildings vanish into the mist as fog grows thicker.
The air feels damp and quiet under the heavy fog.
